pre_code:
#define TYPE_PCIBASE_DEVICE "rtl8139"
    typedef struct PCIBaseState PCIBaseState;
    OBJECT_DECLARE_SIMPLE_TYPE(PCIBaseState, PCIBASE_DEVICE)

    #define DRV_NAME "8139too"
    #define RTL8139_VENDOR_ID 0x10ec
    #define RTL8139_DEVICE_ID 0x8139
post_code:
#define TYPE_PCIBASE_DEVICE "8130too_pci"
    typedef struct PCIBaseState PCIBaseState;
    OBJECT_DECLARE_SIMPLE_TYPE(PCIBaseState, PCIBASE_DEVICE)

    #define RTL8139_VENDOR_ID 0x10ec
    #define RTL8139_DEVICE_ID 0x8139
modify_details: The device name generated by the large model is incorrect. TYPE_PCIBASE_DEVICE is the registered name and should be set to 8139too_pci. The DRV_NAME macro is unused and incorrectly defined, so it can be removed.
